originalTitle: Apollo and Blackstone raise $35bn in chip financing deal for Anthropic
summary: Transaction is one of the largest private credit fundraisings, fuelling the Claude maker’s AI growth plans
content: Transaction is one of the largest private credit fundraisings, fuelling the Claude maker’s AI growth plans

chineseSummary: 该交易是最大的私人信贷融资之一，推动了克劳德制造商的人工智能增长计划
